examples: Ground waters originating in different beds commingle.
A like fate awaits him and the two rages commingle in a whirlpool.
I think I'll commingle some of these blue flowers with the pink ones.
Real objects in the training area commingle with computer-generated ones such as buildings and enemies.
He said there have been improvements in sectarian relations in the Iraqi capital, but not to the point that the different factions can completely commingle.
